summary: BOQ Builder (Phase-1 Canvas Model) - All backend tests passed (22/22). Frontend UI verified with screenshots showing room cards, item tables, auto-calculation, save functionality, and status modal.

issues: Fixed: HTML nesting warning - div inside p tag in DialogDescription (StatusBadge inside DialogDescription)

passed_tests: GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Returns 200 with BOQ data or creates new draft with 10 default rooms
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Has required fields: boq_id, project_id, version, status, rooms, grand_total
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Rooms have structure: room_id, name, items, subtotal
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Invalid project returns 404
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Returns 200 and saves BOQ changes
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/boq - Auto-calculates item totals (quantity × unit_price)
POST /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/rooms - Returns 200 and adds new room
DELETE /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/rooms/{room_id} - Returns 200 and deletes room
DELETE /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/rooms/{room_id} - Recalculates grand total after deletion
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/status - Transitions draft → under_review
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/status - Transitions under_review → draft
PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/status - Invalid status returns 400
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/versions - Returns 200 with versions array
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/versions - Has count field matching versions length
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/summary - Returns 200 with summary data
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/summary - Has required fields: has_boq, status, grand_total, room_count, item_count, version
GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq/summary - Has room_summary with subtotals
Item total calculation: quantity × unit_price = total_price
UI: BOQ Builder page loads at /projects/{id}/boq
UI: Room cards display with collapsible sections
UI: Item table shows columns: Item Name, Description, Dimensions, Qty, Unit, Unit Price, Total
UI: Add Item button adds new row with inline editing
UI: Auto-calculation updates total and grand_total in real-time
UI: Save button saves BOQ with success toast
UI: Status modal shows current status and transition options
UI: Sticky footer shows Total Rooms, Total Items, Grand Total
critical_code_review_comments: Minor HTML nesting issue fixed: StatusBadge (div) was inside DialogDescription (p tag) - fixed by using asChild prop
seed_data_creation: Created test item 'Kitchen Cabinet' (5 nos × ₹15,000 = ₹75,000) in Kitchen room for project proj_4aaba062
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOQ Builder (Phase-1) fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq creates new draft with 10 default rooms if none exists, 2) PUT saves BOQ with auto-calculated totals, 3) POST/DELETE for room operations, 4) Status transitions (draft→under_review→locked), 5) Version history tracking, 6) Summary endpoint for project details page. UI shows room cards with item tables, inline editing, auto-calculation, and sticky grand total footer. Test project proj_4aaba062 has BOQ with Kitchen Cabinet item (₹75,000).

boq_builder.auto_calculation: quantity × unit_price = total_price, sum of items = room subtotal, sum of subtotals = grand_total

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/boq: Get or create BOQ with default rooms

frontend_ui.header: BOQ Builder title, status badge, project name, version, History/Status/Save buttons
frontend_ui.room_cards: Collapsible cards with room name, item count, subtotal
frontend_ui.item_table: Item Name, Description, Dimensions (W×H×D), Qty, Unit, Unit Price, Total columns
frontend_ui.actions: Add Room, Add Item, Duplicate Item, Delete Item, Rename Room, Delete Room
frontend_ui.footer: Sticky footer with Total Rooms, Total Items, Grand Total
